subcodes.first_line: ...Those souls that, in this day, enter the divine kingdom and attain everlasting life, although materially dwelling on earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوسی که اليوم بملکوت الهيّه داخل و بحيات ابديّه فائز آن نفوس هر چند بظاهر در زمينند
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of imagination; thought; right intention
